description: Qwen3-30B-A3B-Instruct-2507 Q4_K_M — MoE, ~3B active. Best quality on relevance scoring + summaries.
Qwen3-8B Q4_K_M — fits entirely in 6GB VRAM. Fast, decent quality.
Llama 3.2 3B Instruct Q4_K_M — small, very fast. Acceptable summaries, weaker filtering.
Gemma 3 12B Instruct Q4_K_M — Google's open model, strong instruction following.
Mistral Nemo 12B Instruct Q4_K_M — 128K context, good multilingual support.
Phi-4 14B Q4_K_M — Microsoft's reasoning-focused model, strong on structured output.
